title_en: Glass vs. Plastic: The Battle for Your Health
title_es: Vidrio vs. Plástico: La Batalla por Tu Salud
hook_en: Watch what happens when I heat this plastic container!
hook_es: ¡Mira qué pasa cuando caliento este contenedor de plástico!
key_message: Heating plastic containers releases harmful microplastics into your food, while glass keeps your meals safe.
_source_food_context:
DAILY STAPLE COMPARISON [Kitchen Essentials]:
• HEALTHY: Glass food storage containers and stainless steel water bottles
• PROCESSED/CONVENTIONAL: Plastic food containers and water bottles (BPA, BPS, phthalates — especially when heated or scratched)
• KEY FACT: Heating plastic containers (even BPA-free) releases endocrine-disrupting microplastics into food. A study found that microwaving plastic releases billions of nanoplastic particles per serving. Glass and steel are chemically inert
• VISUAL IDEA: Put a plastic container next to a glass one — 'one leaches chemicals when heated, one doesn't. Which one is cheaper long-term?'

title_en: Plastic vs. Steel: Which Water Bottle Wins?
hook_en: Ever wondered what's in your water? Let's find out!
hook_es: ¿Te has preguntado qué hay en tu agua? ¡Vamos a descubrirlo!
key_message: Stainless steel bottles are a healthier choice as they don't leach chemicals like plastic.
